mapper.sql: id,title,content,status,publisher_role,publisher_id, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(addtime)*1000 as addtime, IFNULL(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(publish_time)*1000, NULL) as publish_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM gonggao WHERE status=1 ORDER BY publish_time DESC, addtime DESC
SELECT FROM gonggao WHERE publisher_role='teacher' AND publisher_id=#{publisherId} ORDER BY addtime DESC
SELECT FROM gonggao ORDER BY addtime DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE gonggao SET status=0 WHERE id=#{id}
